title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
Art You Can Walk Through
Explore beautiful, playable environments made from Van Gogh's best known paintings, from sunlit fields in the Netherlands to the glowing night skies that only he could imagine. Each and every landscape is a work of art in motion, rendered in his bold, expressive brushstroke style and alive with the emotion he poured into every canvas.

For details: http://bit.ly/sky-patchnotes

Follow us for news:
- Discord/Facebook/X/Instagram/TikTok: @thatskygame
- YouTube/Twitch: @tha

title: Arena Breakout: Realistic FPS
notes:
Map Updates
Fog Valley: New Order
An unknown experiment, a valley shrouded in fog. Enemies and "friends," a bizarre liminality. In the heavy fog, you faintly hear something that sounds like... "Hello"...
A series of mysterious and bizarre phenomena have appeared in the Valley. Your job is to explore and uncover what's causing these eerie events!
Sanity
Your Sanity will decrease in certain areas and slowly recover outside of them.
As your Sanity drops, your vision and stamina will be affected.
Me

title: Knit Out
notes:
A new mechanic joins the game — and it keeps you guessing.
Introducing the FLIP GATE. Each move you make flips it to one side, trapping the bobbins there. Your next move flips it right back, trapping the other side instead.
Plan your moves, and turn the gate to your favor.
Plus, we’ve added 50 BRAND NEW LEVELS built around this new challenge.
Update now and master the Flip Gate! :thread::sparkles:

Get ready to spice up your kitchens because our latest update is here, and it's hotter than ever!
NEW DISHES & INGREDIENTS: Dive into an array of fresh ingredients and delectable dishes!
NEW LOCATION: We've added a new location for you to explore and renovate!
BUG FIXES: We’ve been busy behind the scenes squashing pesky bugs!

title: Marvel Contest of Champions
notes:
NEW CHAMPIONS

Hobgoblin (Phil Urich)
After discovering his uncle Roderick Kingsley’s Goblin legacy, Phil Urich became Hobgoblin, tearing through New York on a screaming glider, his pumpkin bombs and razor bats fueled by rage rather than control. 


Black Tarantula 
Carlos LaMuerte is not the first Black Tarantula, and he won’t be the last. After his wife fled to New York with their son and his heir, Carlos followed, bringing his strength to a world of superheroes, supervillains, and ninjas!
